title: Health Warning
description: Health Warning is a mod that reminds you when you only have 3 hearts left.
body:
**Health Warning**
Health Warning is a lightweight utility mod designed to keep you alive during intense gameplay. It provides a clear, visual reminder the moment your health drops to 3 hearts or less, ensuring you never lose track of your vitality in the heat of battle.

**Key Features:**
**Critical Alerts:** Automatically triggers a warning when you reach a dangerous health threshold.

**Stay Focused: Perfect for players who often get distracted by combat and forget to check their health bar.**

**Vanilla Friendly:** Seamlessly integrates with the game's UI without cluttering your screen.

Whether you're exploring dark caves or fighting a boss, Health Warning has your back so you can react quickly, heal up, and stay in the game.
